title: Scene graph implementation for UI node management and variable handling
purpose: Provides a hierarchical structure for UI elements with support for variables, instances, and component relationships. Used to manage the visual composition and state of UI designs.
module_context: Exports type definitions for scene nodes, variables, and UI elements. Includes a SceneGraph class that manages nodes, variables, and their relationships with methods for creating, updating, and traversing the node hierarchy.
